post_tensor.instructions_for_next: The next cycle will write a short story. Constraints: (1) use the established narrator voice — reflective, grounded in small physical/sensory detail; (2) the topic is fully open, no seed concept is in play. Do not reach back for 'patience' or any residue of the retired strand. Generate or receive a fresh situation and write from there. Watch for any unconscious thematic drift toward the retired concept — declare it as a loss if it surfaces.
open_questions: What topic, theme, or situation will the free story inhabit — to be determined entirely in the next cycle without inherited seed?
Will the narrator voice be first-person, second-person, or close third — not yet specified?

strands.content: A reflective narrator who notices small physical details. Sensory grounding is a defining trait — the narrator lingers on the concrete and specific rather than the abstract. This voice is retained as the stable foundation for whatever story emerges next.

key_claims.text: The narrator favors concrete sensory detail.
The narrator voice is the only inherited constraint for the next story.

strands.title: narrator_voice
